_comment: Example embedding-backend config for KennisBank retrieval + semantic tiling. setup.sh copies this to <vault>/.claude/kennisbank-embed.json on install (only if absent; --force overwrites). Read by scripts/_embeddings.py. Env vars override these at runtime (KB_EMBED_PROVIDER, KB_EMBED_MODEL, KB_EMBED_ENDPOINT, KB_EMBED_API_KEY_ENV, KB_RETRIEVE_TOP_N, KB_RETRIEVE_THRESHOLD). Switching model/provider invalidates the embedding cache by design (cross-model vectors are never compared); the next SessionStart rebuilds it. See CONFIGURATION.md section 4.
_threshold_note: Model-specific. Empirical on qwen3-embedding:8b: true match 0.73-0.80, noise <=0.51, irrelevant <=0.35; 0.60 sits in the gap. Re-tune after a model switch.

_switching._comment: Set api_key_env to the NAME of the env var holding the key; never put the key itself here. Anthropic/Claude has no native embeddings API; Voyage is their recommended path. OpenRouter embeddings support is thin/unconfirmed, so verify a gateway serves /embeddings before using provider=openai against it.
